name: the-infinite-game
description: Simon Sinek's guide to leading with an infinite mindset — shifting from short-term competition to long-term purpose, building organizations that outlast their leaders, and advancing a Just Cause that inspires.
useCase: Shifting from finite to infinite mindset, defining a Just Cause, building Trusting Teams, learning from Worthy Rivals, practicing Existential Flexibility, leading with courage for long-term impact.
knownRisks: Some critics argue Sinek's frameworks are simplified and lack academic rigor
The 'infinite game' metaphor is borrowed from James Carse — readers may benefit from the original
Not all industries or situations can easily apply an infinite mindset — some competitive environments require finite tactics
Sinek's examples (Microsoft, Kodak) are retrospectively applied and may oversimplify complex histories
